# Failure

**Associated Type**

The kind of errors this subscriber might receive.

## Declaration

```swift
associatedtype Failure : Error
```

## Discussion

Use `Never` if this `Subscriber` cannot receive errors.

## Declaring supporting types

- **Input**: The kind of values this subscriber receives.

items.description: The kind of values this subscriber receives.
items.name: Input
